name: OurRevolution.com
subject: FWD: Continue the political revolution in Maryland
body:
Did you see this event?
#
Hey Friend,

Did you see this event? It's critical that we make progressive voices heard during our lobby day this Monday. It's up to each of us to build a sustained, mass movement in MD, and this is how we make a beginning.

Join us on **[Monday, February 27th from 4:00 to 8:00 pm as we take this energy right to the halls of power in Annapolis.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a03/43f17890/211856e0/62003839/4068768683/VEsH/ "http://go.ourrevolution.com/page/event/detail/gplrtl?source=em170219-md-nobus")** We will advocate for a bold and powerful platform for economic and social justice in Maryland to enact this progressive agenda.

In Solidarity,

Kyle Machado

\---------------
Sisters and Brothers -
Across the country millions of people are taking to the streets and marching on the halls of power, speaking out for economic, social and environmental justice, standing up against racism and the threat to vulnerable communities, and in defense of our health and the environment.
An exciting new chapter of Our Revolution has been formed in Maryland called Our Revolution Maryland. Our goal is to transform American politics to make our political and economic systems once again responsive to the needs of working families.
[**Can you join us for an important mobilization of Our Revolution in Annapolis? Your voice is needed to show the politicians the broad base of support this progressive agenda has in our state. Please join us for ****an important mobilization and lobby day.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a03/43f17890/211856e0/62003839/4068768683/VEsE/ "http://go.ourrevolution.com/page/event/detail/gplrtl?source=em170219-md-nobus")
Our Revolution organizing meetings have been held all over Maryland in the last several weeks to build the mass movement necessary to win progressive change in the state -- and the country.

**[RSVP TO ATTEND»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a03/43f17890/211856e0/62003826/4068768683/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/event/detail/gplrtl?source=em170219-md-nobus")**

In solidarity,
Our Revolution Maryland

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a03/43f17890/211856e0/62003827/4068768683/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a03/43f17890/211856e0/62003824/4068768683/VEsD/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a03/43f17890/211856e0/62003825/4068768683/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Democrats.org
subject: SIGN ON: Tell Congress to investigate Trump's ties with Russia
body:
We need an independent investigation into Trump's ties with Russia.
---
**New details are trickling out every day about the Trump administration's ties to Russia. Add your name to demand an independent investigation immediately:

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Investigate-Trump-and-Russia1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170224_ew_nd&source=em_20170224_ew_nd")**
Did you hear about the terrorist attack in Sweden?

Me neither. And neither did millions of confused Swedes. So why was Donald Trump talking about one in front of a huge crowd at his first re-election campaign rally last week?

The answer is pretty simple. When Donald Trump wants to sweep something under the rug, he invents a distraction. The thing he doesn't want you to see: the new details that are trickling out every day about his administration's ties to Russia.

Don't let the smokescreen fool you. Donald can shout "fake news" all he wants, and make up fictional attacks from Bowling Green to Stockholm and everywhere in between.

But the fact remains that there are serious questions that need to be answered. Did Trump's campaign coordinate with Russian intelligence to sabotage our democracy? Does Trump keep lavishing praise on Putin as payback for helping Trump win? Is he being blackmailed by the Kremlin?

We can't stop Trump from lying ten times a minute, but we can keep the pressure on Republicans in Congress to not let this administration off the hook.

**Add your name to demand an independent investigation into Trump and Russia immediately:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Investigate-Trump-and-Russia1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170224_ew_nd&source=em_20170224_ew_nd")**
Thanks for keeping this up,

Eric

Eric Walker
Deputy Communications Director
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c573/4067b0a/2d7e2e76a/7e7d0cb0/3512383786/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170224_ew_nd&source=em_20170224_ew_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c573/4067b0a/2d7e2e76a/7e7d0cb1/3512383786/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170224_ew_nd&source=em_20170224_ew_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c573/4067b0a/2d7e2e76a/7e7d0cbe/3512383786/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170224_ew_nd&source=em_20170224_ew_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c573/4067b0a/2d7e2e76a/7e7d0cbf/3512383786/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170224_ew_nd&source=em_20170224_ew_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Trump=20Headquarters?=
subject: Do you approve of Trump’s first month?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
President Trump wants you to assess the work he’s done for you. |

Friend, After a busy first month in office, President Trump wants to know what you think of the job he’s doing for our country. His chief responsibility is to you, the American people -- and the only approval that matters to him is yours, Friend. Please take our First Month Approval Survey to assess the job President Trump has done for our country. >> On Inauguration Day, President Trump made a promise to America that we would build a new government beholden to We The People. But the only way to be certain that President Trump is fighting for the issues you care about is if you step up and have a say in your government right now. President Trump works for you. And he wants you to assess his work. Please take our First Month Approval Survey now. >> Thank you, Trump Headquarters

TAKE THE SURVEY

Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecfbaBAKbQHR2kCKcWfaFNAkDRMN6aaaaK-AuBMLA1Qwa?p=6@wA2617&Z=ik1dqgnn~2_lhfdq.Xth&q=X&2=
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of the Republican National Committee's online community. If you have any questions, concerns, or thoughts on the Republican Party, just click here to send us a message! If you'd like more information on the GOP platform or to volunteer, visit gop.com. Getting emails from the RNC is one of the best ways to stay up-to-date on our fight to take back the White House, but if you really want to scale back, click here to receive less email or click here to unsubscribe Or unsubscribe by email. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the GOP on Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram. Thank you for all that you do to help elect a conservative president.

Please take our First Month Approval Survey to assess the job President Trump has done for our country. >>
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: Donna Brazile
subject: Do Democrats matter? Hell yes.
body:
The future of our party
---
**Make an investment in the future of our party. Pitch in $10 or more today:
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c58c/4067b0a/2d7901e3b/7e7de870/2514372496/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Our-Party-Our-Future-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170224_db_v2s2&source=em_20170224_db_v2s2")****
Friend --

I walked by the newsstand the other day and saw a magazine cover story asking: "Do the Democrats Matter?"

My answer right back was, "Hell yes we do."

Even though my time as Chair is coming to an end, my work for this party isn't even close to being finished. Because I know how much Democrats matter -- and how important our role is going to be for the next few years as Republicans try to wear us down and make us feel like we don't.

We matter to our Muslim neighbors, who shouldn't have to live in fear in their own country.

We matter to DREAMers, who want to know they still have a future in this country.

We matter to the tens of millions who can now afford health care -- because Democrats fought like hell for it -- and need to know they will still be able to afford it tomorrow.

We matter to the little girls who saw our party nominate the first woman to win the popular vote in our nation's history, and deserve to know they can still grow up to be president someday.

I'm looking forward to standing with our new Chair and making sure that folks in all 50 states realize how much Democrats still matter as we build ourselves back up and get ready to win. Pitch in $10 or whatever you can right now if you're with us.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c58c/4067b0a/2d7901e3b/7e7de87e/2514372496/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-party-our-future?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170224_db_v2s2&source=em_20170224_db_v2s2")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c58c/4067b0a/2d7901e3b/7e7de87f/2514372496/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-party-our-future?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170224_db_v2s2&source=em_20170224_db_v2s2")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c58c/4067b0a/2d7901e3b/7e7de87c/2514372496/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-party-our-future?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170224_db_v2s2&source=em_20170224_db_v2s2")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c58c/4067b0a/2d7901e3b/7e7de87d/2514372496/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-party-our-future?express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170224_db_v2s2&source=em_20170224_db_v2s2")
[QUICK DONATE: $200](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c58c/4067b0a/2d7901e3b/7e7de87a/2514372496/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-party-our-future?express_lane=true&amount=200&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+QUICK+DONATE+200&utm_campaign=em_20170224_db_v2s2&source=em_20170224_db_v2s2")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c58c/4067b0a/2d7901e3b/7e7de87b/2514372496/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/Our-Party-Our-Future-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170224_db_v2s2&source=em_20170224_db_v2s2")
** >From the bottom of my heart, thank you for being part of this.

Donna

Donna Brazile
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c58c/4067b0a/2d7901e3b/7e7de802/2514372496/VEsHAA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=15+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170224_db_v2s2&source=em_20170224_db_v2s2"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c58c/4067b0a/2d7901e3b/7e7de803/2514372496/VEsHAw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=16+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170224_db_v2s2&source=em_20170224_db_v2s2"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c58c/4067b0a/2d7901e3b/7e7de800/2514372496/VEsHAg/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=17+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170224_db_v2s2&source=em_20170224_db_v2s2") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c58c/4067b0a/2d7901e3b/7e7de801/2514372496/VEsHDQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=18+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170224_db_v2s2&source=em_20170224_db_v2s2"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: ANNOUNCEMENT@dscc.org
subject: Elizabeth Warren wants to meet you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Senator Elizabeth Warren wants to have lunch with you! Here's how to enter and win a free trip to Washington, D.C.: Senator Elizabeth Warren wants to have lunch with you! Here's how to enter and win a free trip to Washington, D.C.:
---
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warren-lunch-032017?refcode=DPE-20170224-Announcement_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Friend --

Fighting President Trump's reckless agenda doesn't leave Senator Elizabeth Warren with a lot of spare time. But she does love hearing from grassroots Democrats -- and she needs to eat!

**So this March, we 're hosting Senator Warren and one lucky supporter at our headquarters for lunch together in Washington, D.C. (flight and hotel are on us)!**

[**Just chip in any amount and your name will be automatically entered for your chance to join Elizabeth Warren for lunch!**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warren-lunch-032017?refcode=DPE-20170224-Announcement_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

| [](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warren-lunch-032017?refcode=DPE-20170224-Announcement_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---

Here's what you could win, friend:

✔ A lunch to remember with Senator Elizabeth Warren
✔ Roundtrip travel to Washington, D.C.
✔ Hotel accommodations in our nation's capital

This is an opportunity you don't want to miss --_plus,_ your contribution will go toward electing strong Democrats to fight side-by-side with Elizabeth Warren in the Senate!

**[https://secure.actblue.com/pages/warren-lunch-032017](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warren-lunch-032017?refcode=DPE-20170224-Announcement_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Best of luck!
Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
No purchase, payment, or contribution necessary to enter or win, and will not improve chances of winning.

Void where prohibited. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents, who are legal residents of 50 United States, the District of Columbia, or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). Entries must be received between February 23 and March 2, 2017. You may enter by **[contributing here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e359/2b07114c/45f7f3f3/736aeaf2/4097634034/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warren-lunch-032017")**. Alternatively, you can enter without contributing by [clicking here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e359/2b07114c/45f7f3f3/736aeaed/4097634034/VEsO/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/meet-elizabeth-warren-032017"). One winner will be selected to attend lunch with Elizabeth Warren and will receive the following prize package: a round-trip ticket within the continental U.S. to Washington, D.C., hotel accommodations for one, and lunch with Senator Elizabeth Warren (approximate retail value of prize package $1,000). Odds of winning depend on number of eligible entries received. All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e359/2b07114c/45f7f3f3/736aeaec/4097634034/VEsP/ "http://www.dscc.org/lunch-with-elizabeth-warren-rules"). Sponsor: DSCC, 120 Maryland Ave NE, Washington, DC 20002.

The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e359/2b07114c/45f7f3f3/736aeaef/4097634034/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e359/2b07114c/45f7f3f3/736aeaee/4097634034/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e359/2b07114c/45f7f3f3/736aeae9/4097634034/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: John Kasich
subject: My meeting with the President
body:
I wanted to send you a short update about my visit with President
Trump and members of his staff to discuss the lessons we've
learned in Ohio about healthcare and how this can be very helpful
as Congress looks to reform Obamacare.

Peter, I wanted to send you a
short update about my visit with President Trump and members of
his staff to discuss the lessons we've learned in Ohio about
healthcare and how this can be very helpful as Congress looks to
reform Obamacare.

The President was generous with
his time as we also discussed education & job training, the need
for the administration to speak with one voice on national
security issues, trade, how we can do more to prevent human
trafficking, the opioid drug abuse that is straining our
communities and the high costs of prescription medicine and
various remedies to this growing problem.

Here was my statement after the
meeting:

I'm looking forward to continuing
the conversation about healthcare reform, at the President's
invitation, with HHS Secretary Price and White House Chief of
Staff Priebus on Saturday. I will also meet with fellow governors
to discuss these reforms.

If you'd like to watch a short
clip from my remarks to the media after my meeting at the White
House, you can watch it on C-SPAN (here).

You can also read my latest op-ed
in Forbes: A Roadmap To Responsible Health Care Reform, If
Washington Leaders Partner With States

Finally, I will be a guest on CBS
"Face the Nation" Sunday morning. Find your local listing (here).

Thank you for your ongoing
support and please continue to follow along on social media for
more updates: Twitter (here) and Facebook (here).

-John

John Kasich
Governor of Ohio

Paid for by Kasich
for America
www.JohnKasich.com

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system July 18, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/iWuDbUalNs

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/oWuDbUalNs

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-42175443109-echo3-C361BEF3EFBC6588F2530DFE6D7E6BB8@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Team Trump-Pence
subject: Week 5: Achieving Results For The American People
body:
| | [](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in2242&n=1)
---
### [ ](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in2242&n=2)
---
Peter, With just over a month of presidency under his belt, you've seen what President Trump’s incredible work ethic has accomplished in a short period of time. The President is jump-starting job creation, saving taxpayers money, restoring public safety, draining the swamp, and keeping his promise to defend the Constitution. You want a government that serves the people -- not the donors and not the special interests. You want a Government that keeps its promises. A great spirit of optimism is sweeping all across the country. It is a new day in America and President Donald Trump is making us proud again. Learn more about how the President and Vice President are achieving results for the American people below.
* * *
****THIS WEEK

****
* * *
* ****Making America Great Again

**** President Trump held a rally on Saturday in Florida to talk to supporters about all the progress in Making America Great Again. It's important to the President to be among the people who he's working for every day. This past election was a great movement - a movement we've never seen before in our country. President Trump put it best when he said, "I want to be in a room filled with hardworking American patriots who love their country, who salute their flag, and who pray for a better future."

* **Honoring The Millions Of African-Americans Who Built Our National Heritage

** On Tuesday, President Trump visited the new National Museum of African-American History and Culture in Washington, DC. President Trump toured the museum with Dr. Ben Carson and his family, South Carolina Senator Tim Scott, and Alveda King — Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.’s niece. President Trump pledges to do everything he can to continue that promise of freedom for African Americans and for every American. He's proud that we now have a museum that honors the millions of African American men and women who built our national heritage, specifically emphasizing faith, culture, and the unbreakable American spirit.

* **Cutting Waste In The Government's Budget

** Our national debt has doubled over the last eight years. President Trump held a budget meeting this week that set the tone for cutting wasteful government spending and putting taxpayer dollars to good use. The President wants the American people to know that our budget will reflect the priorities of the American people and he will be directing all government departments and agencies to protect every last American and every last tax dollar starting with the first budget. **No more wasted money.

**
* **Showing The World What America Is All** **About**

Vice President Pence rolled up his sleeves on Thursday and showed the world what America is all about. After vandalism struck a Jewish cemetery in Missouri, VP Pence made a surprise visit to help with the clean-up effort. There's no place in America for hatred, or acts of violence, prejudice, or anti-semitism. That steadfast sentiment was proven this week in Missouri and under President Trump's leadership it is inspiring the nation.

* **Supporting Small Businesses Across America

** This week, Vice President Pence visited Fabick Cat Factory in Missouri, a true American success story of a family-owned business owned and operated since its founding in 1917. Today, Fabick Cat, a machinery manufacturer, has 1,100 employees at 37 locations throughout the Midwest. VP Pence wanted to let this company, all their workers, all the small business owners in attendance, and all small business owners across the country know that President Trump is the best friend America’s small businesses will ever have. Make no mistake about it, America finally has a President who’s going to support and fight for small businesses every single day.

* * *
We're united together by history and by providence. We are making America strong again. We are making America proud again. We are making America safe again. And we are making America great again -- greater than ever before. As a quick reminder CPAC is this week in Washington, DC. If you're in DC, look for our booth and pick up Official Trump-Pence gear! Can't make it? Use this coupon code **'CPAC2017'** to get 10% off your online order at our shop - [visit now by clicking here shop.donaldjtrump.com](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fshop.donaldjtrump.com%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in2242&n=3). We're in this together and we can't thank you enough for your continued support. **Team Trump-Pence** [](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fshop.donaldjtrump.com%2Fcollections%2Flast-chance&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in2242&n=4) [](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.donaldjtrump.com%2Fwe-made-history%3Famount%3D150%26utm_campaign%3Ddjt_website_donate%26utm_source%3Dwebsite%26utm_medium%3Dweb%26utm_content%3Dtop_nav&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in2242&n=5)
---
| | [
twitter ](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FTeamTrump&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in2242&n=6)
---
| [
facebook ](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fofficialteamtrump%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in2242&n=7)
---
| [
instagram ](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Fteamtrumpofficial%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in2242&n=8)
---
Paid for by Donald J. Trump for President, Inc.
| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
Visit our [unsubscribe](http://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in2242&n=9) page to remove yourself from further emails.
725 5th Avenue · New York, NY · 10022
